# ElicitationForm.StringSchemaFormats property

The four permitted `StringSchema.format` literals (spec §20.4, R-20.4-d). A `format`, when present, MUST be exactly one of these; any other value (e.g. `"phone"`) is rejected.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> StringSchemaFormats { get; }
```
